chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 4953 of 2025 [Munir Ahmed Khan versus FOP & others] Petitioner: Munir Ahmed Khan, Advocate / Petitioner in person. Date of hearing: 13-10-2025 Date of decision: 13-10-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Petitioner seeks a writ to the Embassy of Pakistan at Kabul, Afghanistan for deciding a visa application moved by the Petitioner’s friends. He submits that the visa application has not been decided since May, 2025 and that such delay infringes the fundamental right of the Petitioner. However, he is not able to identify what fundamental right of the Petitioner is infringed by the delay in processing a visa application made by his friends at Kabul. Therefore, the petition is dismissed in limine alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
